report.summary: Cycle-close: 2 new learn guides scaffolded (EIP-7702 Smart Accounts + Passkey Embedded Wallets) with 0 TS errors. PUBLISH_QUEUE refilled to 2 items. TS errors stable at 142 (no regression). Git locks Day 10 — 803 uncommitted files.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 2 new pages built this cycle: /learn/eip-7702-smart-accounts-guide-2026 and /learn/passkey-embedded-wallets-guide-2026 — both page.tsx confirmed present
New pages are CLEAN: 0 TypeScript errors in either new guide (no regression from new content)
Total TS errors stable at 142 (unchanged from v4): lido-v3-stvaults (94), structured-data.examples (40), crypto-arbitrage-strategies (4), institutional-crypto-adoption (2), crypto-index-funds (2)
Published slugs: 517 entries / 500 unique (up from 515/496 — 2 new entries added to PUBLISH_QUEUE)

Page audit: 103 published slugs still missing page.tsx files — unchanged
Build bypasses TS errors via ignoreBuildErrors: true in next.config.ts

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API routes present: /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields
Cache TTLs verified: prices (swr:120s), trending (swr:600s), fear-greed (swr:1200s), market-metrics (swr:120s), market-dominance (swr:600s), defi-yields (dynamic — empty swr value detected)
NOTE: defi-yields has empty stale-while-revalidate value — should be investigated
Rate limiter coverage: 0/6 core API routes wired to checkRateLimit — carry-over P1
CoinGecko free tier risk persists — no API key configured
No code changes to API routes this cycle

sections.title: DevOps
items: Git lock files persist: .git/HEAD.lock (Mar 16) + .git/index.lock (Mar 16) — DAY 10 of blocker
803 uncommitted files (up from 799 in v4 — 4 new files from 2 guide pages)
48 files changed vs last commit (e999560) with 4,407 insertions / 3,464 deletions
Last deployed commit: e999560 (Mar 17) — 'publish: promote 2 pages to production (Day 62)'
Deploy gap: ~170+ pages built locally but not live in production — Day 8 since last push
next.config.ts has ignoreBuildErrors: true — Vercel builds bypass TS errors
CRITICAL: Jefe must manually run: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock && git add -A && git commit && git push
